summary: Removed all legacy AWS/S3, Vercel, and Turso code. Deleted s3-upload.js and 4 Turso seed/migration scripts. Simplified transformS3Url to pass-through, removed uploadS3 stub from utils.js. Rewrote downloadEventImages in eventbrite-scraper.js to drop s3-upload import. Removed commented @vercel imports from 3 layout files. Rewrote pre-commit to use npm run build. Removed TURSO_URL/TURSO_TOKEN from env.d.ts. Renamed uploadS3_API to uploadImage in MetaEditor.svelte. Fixed hardcoded vercel.app URL in sidebar.astro. Build: Complete!
